title: Kanban Plan — Golden Standard Documentation and Publication
description: Create docs in MD+HTML describing CineTaste golden standard and publish via publish_me.

planning_session.author: codex
planning_session.goal: Document golden standard principles and publish as premium HTML

DONE.task: Synthesize golden standard principles from PROFILE, AURA, PROTOCOL and flow structure
DONE.status_note: Completed with explicit boundary model and role separation between PROFILE.md, AURA.md, PROTOCOL.json, FLOW.md, manifests and contracts.

DONE.task: Create docs markdown file with full principle set and operating rules
DONE.status_note: Created docs/golden-standard.md with mission, principles, boundary model, change model, LLM expectations, DoD and anti-patterns.

DONE.task: Create HTML companion with high-quality typography and readable layout
DONE.status_note: Created docs/golden-standard.html with premium typography, structured sections, responsive layout and visual hierarchy.

DONE.task: Run publish_me --help then publish resulting document and capture link
DONE.notes: If tool is unavailable, report exact blocker
DONE.status_note: Executed publish_me --help and published both HTML (--direct) and Markdown versions to VPS; links captured.

DONE.task: Self-review artifacts and update kanban completion status
DONE.status_note: Completed review of generated files and publication outputs; kanban moved to DONE.

acceptance_criteria: docs contains a markdown golden standard document
docs contains a styled HTML golden standard document
document explicitly covers executable markdown, CLI isolation, kanban planning, aura/profile boundary, and contract-first replacement safety
final response includes publication result or concrete blocker
